title: alnus glutinosa f. pyramidalis
intro: Alnus glutinosa f. pyramidalis, also known as the pyramidal form of the black alder tree, is a variant of the common alder (Alnus glutinosa) that exhibits a narrower and more upright growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Alnus glutinosa f. pyramidalis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support immune function. Alnus glutinosa f. pyramidalis is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
